target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; structural debris piled at base; visible collapse of load-bearing elements; damage exceeds 75% of visible target area

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building shows complete collapse of its upper structure; debris piles at ground level; facade is missing; structural integrity is compromised; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings are assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, showing extensive facade loss, collapsed roofs, and structural debris consistent with over 75% damage. The scene depicts a street with severely damaged multi-story buildings, rubble-strewn ground, and a single intact car, indicating widespread destruction. The functional impact is likely complete loss of habitation and commercial use in the area due to the total destruction of the assessed structures.
